summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sarvbhasa landing page - all features working perfectly. Tested backend APIs, frontend UI components, dropdown functionality, loading animation, chatbot interface, and full user flow integration.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ endpoint returns correct response
Backend API /api/chat works with mocked responses
Landing page loads with correct headlines 'India's Sovereign AI Platform' and 'AI that speaks every language'
Topbar displays Sarvbhasa logo and brand name correctly
Platform dropdown trigger opens dropdown panel with blur effect
About Sarvbhasa API section expands to show 'Uses Sarvam Maurya API'
Languages Translate section expands to show all 5 languages (Marathi, Gujarati, Hindi, English, Malayalam)
Both nav and hero CTA buttons trigger loading animation
Loading screen displays logo and 'SARVBHASA' text with animation
Loading transitions to chatbot interface after 2 seconds
Chatbot interface has functional input field and send button
User can type messages and receive mocked responses
Back button in chatbot returns to landing page
Full user flow: Landing → Loading → Chatbot → Back to Landing works seamlessly
